label.description: The identifier for the block type

data.description: Data payload varies by block label

allOf.errorMessage: If assignVariable is true, variableName is required and cannot be empty.
If saveData is true, dataColumn is required and cannot be empty.
If saveToColumn is true, dataColumn is required.
If waitForSelector is true, waitSelectorTimeout is required.
If clearProxy is false, host and port are required.
loopThrough numbers requires fromNumber and toNumber.
loop-data requires startIndex and maxLoop when not looping numbers and resumeLastWorkflow is false.
type update requires dataFrom and valueInputOption.
type append requires dataFrom and valueInputOption.
cookie type set requires value, domain, path, expirationDate.
browser-event requires tabUrl or matchPattern when activeTabLoaded is false.
browser-event requires tabUrl or matchPattern when activeTabLoaded is false.
If drawing is false, note text is required.
Selector Type Mismatch: Node uses an XPath selector but 'findBy' is not set to 'xpath'.
